body.title: Route igor's 3 direct-reasoner bypassers through the Proxy
body.intention: I intend that no igor code reaches a provider except through the Proxy — including paths the gateway-only grep misses.
body.description:
**Problem:** The original test #1 only grepped inference_gateway.py, but the survey found 3 direct-reasoner call sites OUTSIDE the gateway that still bypass the Proxy: cognition/relay.py:39 (self.reasoner.reason(...)), cognition/multi_cloud.py:34 (reasoner.reason(...)), main.py:9445 (r.reason(msg, mems, core, ...) — a 2-tuple direct reasoner). A green gateway grep would falsely read as 'igor inference fully centralized'.
**Proposed shape:** Repoint each through the Proxy seam built in T-inf-reroute-A (the shared message-assembler + dispatch()). For multi_cloud.py confirm whether multi-provider fan-out is still intended or is superseded by the Proxy's routing; if superseded, collapse it. Preserve each call site's observable behavior.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/relay.py, cognition/multi_cloud.py, main.py (~L9445). Reuses A's assembler.
**Design rules:** Inference-Proxy-only; flag-direct-provider-calls.
**Scope boundary:** IN — the 3 named bypassers route through the Proxy. OUT — the gateway surfaces (A/B); dead-code deletion (C).
**Test plan:** (1) grep igor/ for .reason( on a raw reasoner (not gateway/Proxy) -> 0 at these 3 sites. (2) each repointed site routes through stubbed dispatch.
**Completion criteria:** zero direct-provider reasoner calls remain in igor outside the Proxy client; tests green.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: /relay + /cloud route through the Inference Proxy: RelaySession dispatches with req.model (experiment), query_multiple dispatches each model (comparison), compare_responses synthesizes tier-routed (model=''); _extra_reasoners->_cloud_models strings, _t4/OpenRouterReasoner deps dropped. Contract: tier-not-model, model only for test/experiment/compare, all via Proxy. Proof red=AssertionError green=passed @46c79ffc.
